narrative:
Washington Twp township has 1,930 registered voters, with 54.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.2 percentage points.
